texto: At this stage of my life I would rather try and have some small impact within a company and suffer through those things than make such a big stink that nobody can trust to work with you. It's very important in an environment of a big institution that people don't feel threatened that you're going to expose them in any way.

texto: Fortunately for children the uncertainties of the present always give way to the enchanted possibilities of the future.
